ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the microcontroller */,
  "program_memory_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the program memory in kilobytes */,
  "data_memory_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the data memory in kilobytes */,
  "clock_speed_mhz" INTEGER /* Clock speed in megahertz */,
  "io_pins" INTEGER /* Number of I/O pins */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the microcontroller model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the microcontroller model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microcontroller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller the register belongs to */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "address" INTEGER /* Address of the register */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the register in bits */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the register */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the register was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the register was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_microcontroller_id FOREIGN KEY ("microcontroller_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("microcontroller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_bits" (
  "bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the bit belongs to */,
  "bit_position" INTEGER /* Position of the bit in the register */,
  "bit_name" TEXT /* Name of the bit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the bit */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the bit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_bits_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the configuration belongs to */,
  "bit_values" TEXT /* Values of the bits in the register for this configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration is associated with */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_configurations" (
  "project_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_configurations_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data in the report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
